prompt:
Goal: Create a polished app-store mascot icon showcase featuring 40 unique cute 3D mascot icons, designed as ASO-friendly mobile app icon concepts.

Canvas: Horizontal 4:3 image on a pure black background, with a neat grid of rounded-square app icons. Use exactly 5 rows and 8 columns, evenly spaced with consistent margins. Each tile is a glossy rounded square with a soft gradient background, subtle inner glow, and soft drop shadow. No text, no labels, no watermark.

Visual style: High-end 3D clay/toy mascot style, kawaii expressions, big friendly eyes, tiny smiles, smooth rounded shapes, vibrant saturated colors, app icon lighting, soft studio shadows, crisp edges, premium iOS icon aesthetic. Every icon should feel like a distinct standalone app mascot.

Icon grid details: Include exactly 40 discrete icons, arranged left to right, top to bottom:
1. white robot head mascot on blue gradient
2. pink piggy bank with coin on green gradient
3. smiling yellow character wearing a sun visor on orange gradient
4. sleepy white cloud hugging itself on purple gradient
5. turquoise travel suitcase wearing sunglasses and a straw hat on teal gradient
6. cute sun partly behind a cloud with raindrops on blue gradient
7. black penguin or bird wearing green headphones with music notes on purple gradient
8. smiling bowl of noodles with chopsticks on red-orange gradient
9. happy corgi dog on green gradient
10. checklist clipboard with pencil on blue gradient
11. graduation cap over a document/card silhouette on purple-pink gradient
12. cute instant camera on pink-red gradient
13. red heart character running with headphones on orange-red gradient
14. green owl with chat bubble on teal gradient
15. red map pin mascot on map background on cyan gradient
16. purple shopping bag mascot on yellow gradient
17. blue shield mascot on deep blue gradient
18. purple notebook mascot with pen on violet gradient
19. purple game controller mascot on dark purple gradient
20. sleeping crescent moon with nightcap, stars, and dark night background
21. smiling potted plant in white pot on green gradient
22. white rocket launching on navy starry gradient
23. painter palette mascot with paintbrush on orange gradient
24. smiling Earth globe on blue gradient
25. vintage microphone mascot on teal gradient
26. chef mascot with white chef hat and spatula on red-orange gradient
27. smiling water droplet holding a glass of water on cyan gradient
28. fluffy llama or alpaca mascot on green gradient
29. glowing yellow lightbulb mascot on yellow-orange gradient
30. purple octopus or blob reading an orange book on violet gradient
31. green battery mascot with lightning symbol on green gradient
32. compass mascot on blue-orange gradient
33. blue whale mascot with water splash on cyan gradient
34. yellow bell mascot on orange gradient
35. smiling white document/page mascot on purple gradient
36. happy white cloud mascot on blue gradient
37. pink microphone mascot with sound waves on magenta gradient
38. penguin mascot wearing a yellow visor on orange gradient
39. treasure chest full of gold coins on purple gradient
40. smiling envelope mascot with wings on light blue gradient

Constraints: Keep all icons consistent in size and visual quality; use charming rounded toy-like geometry; ensure each mascot has a simple cute face where appropriate; preserve the exact 5-by-8 layout and exactly 40 icons.
